features: Large Waterproof Plasters Cut-to-Size – Our large waterproof dressings for wounds come in a flexible, cut to size plasters strip, letting you customize the shape for a perfect fit.
All Around Protection – These waterproof plasters for wounds provide a strong plasters seal, keeping out water and bacteria while being gentle on skin. Ideal waterproof wound dressing swimming.
Breathable & Flexible – Designed for movement, these breathable plasters offer waterproof wound dressing support, perfect for joints and high-friction areas without losing adhesion.
Highly Absorbent – These wound dressings adhesive waterproof plasters draw out pus, blood, and moisture, keeping wounds clean while offering a large waterproof dressing cushion.
Pack of 3 (6 Meters Total) – Includes 2m waterproof dressing and 2m large waterproof plasters for all-purpose first aid protection, great as waterproof dressing for swimming.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Need Reliable Washproof Dressing? Ensure Your Comfort with These Top Picks! Washproof Wound Dressing Add To Basket 6m Fabric Wound Strip Add To Basket 200pk Round Spot Plasters Add To Basket 110pcs Fabric Plasters Add To Basket 24pk Blister Plasters Add To Basket 12pk Dragon Balm Plasters Add To Basket 24pk Dragon Balm Plasters Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 174 4.2 out of 5 stars 220 4.2 out of 5 stars 378 4.2 out of 5 stars 410 4.2 out of 5 stars 159 3.8 out of 5 stars 507 4.2 out of 5 stars 139 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £5.49 £ 5 . 49 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 Easy to Apply ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Adhesive Strength ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Comfortable Fit ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Skin Tone Matching ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✘ ✘ Variety of Sizes ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ How do I cut these large wound dressing strips to the right size? Simply use scissors to cut the fabric roll to your desired size and shape. This allows you to customise the plaster to fit the wound perfectly, ensuring complete coverage and protection. Are these fabric plasters waterproof and suitable for everyday movement? Yes, these flexible plasters are designed to stay secure even on joints and areas of high movement. Their waterproof nature ensures they won’t lose adhesion, offering protection in wet conditions. Do these plasters help prevent infection? Yes, the adhesive fabric creates a firm seal around the wound, preventing bacteria from entering. It also draws away fluids like pus and blood, keeping the area clean and promoting healing. Are these fabric strips suitable for children? Yes, the material is skin-friendly and painless to remove, making it a great choice for children. Its breathable design ensures comfort during use and stays securely in place for hours. How many plasters do I get in this pack? Each pack contains 3 rolls of 2 metres, providing 6 metres in total. This value pack ensures you have enough to handle multiple cuts, scrapes, or wounds, whether at home or on the go.
